intro: National-scope pointers compiled for education only. Confirm every number, address, and rule on official VA and government sites before you rely on them.

phoneDirectory.label: VA Benefits (disability, pension, education, etc.)
phoneDirectory.note: Listed on VA.gov contact pages; hours may vary.

phoneDirectory.label: GI Bill / VA education benefits
phoneDirectory.note: VA education call center (verify on VA education pages).

phoneDirectory.label: VA Health (general)
phoneDirectory.note: National VA health information line—use for general questions, not emergencies.

phoneDirectory.label: VA Debt Management Center
phoneDirectory.note: If VA correspondence references debt or overpayment—confirm on official VA debt pages.

primaryActions.title: Browse VA facilities on this site
primaryActions.description: Use the built-in state selector to open your state VA facilities page and map.

primaryActions.title: VA.gov hub
primaryActions.description: Central entry for benefits, health care, records, and account tools.

primaryActions.title: Accredited representatives (claims help)
primaryActions.description: VA maintains information about accreditation—use official VA resources to find accredited assistance.

organizationsNote: VSO and VFW posts change by location. VA’s accredited representative resources and local veteran service directories are safer starting points than unverified third-party lists.

emergencyCopy.title: If you are in crisis
lines: Dial 988, then press 1 for the Veterans Crisis Line.
If this is a life-threatening emergency, call 911.
emergencyCopy.disclaimer: If you are in immediate danger, call 911. Crisis numbers here are general public information—confirm current contact options on official VA and 988 sites. This is not a substitute for emergency services or professional crisis care.
